scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p qx-wasm --release && "${WASM_BINDGEN:-$HOME/.cargo/bin/wasm-bindgen}" --target web --out-dir web/src/wasm --out-name qx_wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/qx_wasm.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:fe
scripts.bench:wasm: cd .. && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p qx-wasm --release --features decoder && "${WASM_BINDGEN:-$HOME/.cargo/bin/wasm-bindgen}" --target web --out-dir web/bench/wasm --out-name qx_decoder target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/qx_wasm.wasm
